patches.name: Enable Keyboard
patches.description: Re-enables keyboard input that the game disables on startup. Applied early (before VEH).

patches.name: Stage Lock: No Fail
patches.description: Freeze at stage 1 — cannot fail out.

patches.name: Stage Lock: No Game Over
patches.description: Suppress the game over screen. Offset TBD — verify against 2EZ.h before use.

patches.name: Keep Settings
patches.description: Prevents the game from resetting note skin, panel skin, and visual settings between sessions.

children.name: Keep Note Skin
children.description: Persist the selected note skin across sessions.

children.name: Keep Panel Skin
children.description: Persist the selected panel skin across sessions.

children.name: Keep Visual
children.description: Persist the selected visual setting across sessions.

children.name: Keep Random
children.description: Persist the random note arrangement setting.

patches.name: Mode Select Timer Freeze
patches.description: Freezes the mode selection countdown timer. Offset TBD — verify against 2EZ.h before use.

patches.name: Song Select Timer Freeze
patches.description: Freezes the song selection countdown timer. Offset TBD — verify against 2EZ.h before use.

patches.name: Version String
patches.description: Replaces the game version string with EZ2Config branding.
